title: HR MANAGEMENT INFORMATION SYSTEM (HRMIS)
objective: To design and develop a comprehensive monthly performance appraisal system for Orion Group to streamline employee evaluations and ensure consistent, objective assessments across departments.
responsibility: Full-stack development using ASP.NET Web Forms and Entity Framework; integrated Crystal Reports for automated report generation; built responsive UI with HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery; implemented secure role-based access and data validation.
technology: ASP.NET Web Forms, Entity Framework, MSSQL Server, Crystal Reports, JavaScript, jQuery, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap
outcome: Successfully delivered a fully functional monthly appraisal system that reduced manual evaluation time by 40% and provided HR with real-time performance insights.
features: Employee performance tracking on monthly basis
Automated report generation using Crystal Reports
Role-based access for HR, managers, and employees
Responsive UI for desktop and mobile access

title: Orion Yearly Appraisal System
objective: To build an annual performance evaluation platform that supports long-term goal tracking, historical data comparison, and comprehensive year-end reviews for Orion Group employees.
responsibility: Developed using .NET Core MVC with LINQ and Entity Framework; implemented dynamic role-based UI; integrated Crystal Reports for detailed yearly summaries; ensured data integrity and historical trend analysis.
technology: .NET Core MVC, LINQ, Entity Framework, MSSQL Server, Crystal Reports, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap
outcome: Delivered an enterprise-grade yearly appraisal system that improved employee retention insights and provided management with data-driven promotion decisions.
features: Yearly goal tracking and historical comparison
Role-based dashboards for employees and managers

title: Orion Final Settlement System
objective: To develop a comprehensive final settlement system for Orion Group to automate employee exit processes, including full and final settlement calculations, dues tracking, and legal compliance documentation.
responsibility: Full-stack development using ASP.NET Core MVC and Entity Framework; implemented automated calculation of gratuity, leave encashment, and other dues; integrated approval workflows for HR and finance; built responsive UI with jQuery, JavaScript, and Bootstrap; generated settlement reports and legal forms.
technology: ASP.NET Core MVC, Entity Framework, MSSQL Server, jQuery, JavaScript, Bootstrap, HTML5, CSS3
outcome: Successfully reduced employee settlement processing time from 30 days to 7 days, ensured 100% compliance with labor laws, and eliminated manual calculation errors.
features: Automated calculation of gratuity, provident fund, and leave encashment
Settlement history archive for audit purposes

title: Orion Circular Management Solution
objective: To develop a centralized system for managing company circulars, announcements, and internal communications across all Orion Group departments.
responsibility: Built using .NET Core MVC and Entity Framework; designed responsive frontend with Bootstrap and JavaScript; implemented document attachment, expiry tracking, and read-receipt confirmation features.
technology: .NET Core MVC, Entity Framework, MSSQL Server, Bootstrap, HTML5, JavaScript
outcome: Successfully reduced internal communication delays by 60% and ensured all employees received timely access to critical company circulars.

title: Orion Employee Search Portal
objective: To engineer an internal employee directory portal for quick lookup of employee information, department mapping, and organizational chart visualization.
responsibility: Developed using .NET Core MVC with LINQ queries for fast search; implemented autocomplete suggestions and department filters; ensured data privacy with role-based visibility.
technology: .NET Core MVC, LINQ, MSSQL Server, Bootstrap, HTML5, JavaScript
outcome: Provided HR and managers with a fast, searchable employee directory that reduced directory lookup time from minutes to seconds.
features: Secure profile views with access control

title: Bangla CAT ERP Solution
objective: To deliver an end-to-end, full-featured ERP system covering multiple business processes including procurement, inventory, sales, and finance for Bangla CAT.
responsibility: Complete ERP development using ASP.NET MVC5 and Entity Framework; integrated Crystal Reports for business intelligence; designed modular architecture for scalability; implemented user role management and workflow automation.
technology: ASP.NET MVC5, Entity Framework, Crystal Reports, MSSQL Server, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap
outcome: Successfully deployed a comprehensive ERP solution that streamlined operations across 5+ departments and reduced manual data entry by 50%.

title: Al-Madina Pharmaceuticals Ltd. - ERP Solution
objective: To design and develop a complete ERP solution tailored specifically for pharmaceutical operations including batch tracking, expiry management, and regulatory compliance.
responsibility: Led development of pharmaceutical ERP using ASP.NET MVC5; implemented batch-wise inventory tracking; integrated Crystal Reports for batch reports and compliance documentation; ensured adherence to pharma industry standards.
technology: ASP.NET MVC5, Entity Framework, Crystal Reports, MSSQL Server, Bootstrap, JavaScript
outcome: Delivered a pharma-grade ERP that improved batch traceability by 100% and ensured 100% compliance with regulatory reporting requirements.
features: Integration with weighing scales and barcode scanners

title: Indo-Bangla Pharmaceuticals Ltd. - ERP Solution
objective: To develop a customized ERP platform supporting manufacturing, inventory, and finance modules for Indo-Bangla Pharmaceuticals Ltd.
responsibility: Developed manufacturing and inventory modules; implemented financial accounting integration; built Crystal Reports for production analysis; ensured real-time data synchronization across departments.
technology: ASP.NET MVC5, Entity Framework, MSSQL Server, Crystal Reports, JavaScript, Bootstrap
outcome: Successfully deployed an ERP that reduced production downtime by 30% and provided real-time visibility into manufacturing KPIs.
features: Raw material and finished goods inventory
Financial ledger and cost center tracking

title: Burger King - ERP Solution (Procurement, Commercial, Store Modules)
objective: To create key ERP modules for Burger King's operations including procurement, commercial, and store management to streamline restaurant supply chain.
responsibility: Developed procurement, commercial, and store operation modules using ASP.NET MVC5; integrated Crystal Reports for purchase and sales analysis; implemented store-level inventory tracking.
technology: ASP.NET MVC5, Entity Framework, Crystal Reports, MSSQL Server, jQuery, Bootstrap
outcome: Successfully improved store inventory accuracy by 35% and reduced procurement cycle time by 25% across multiple Burger King outlets.

title: Lovello - ERP Solution (Partial Involvement)
objective: To contribute to core module development of Lovello's ERP system focusing on production and inventory management.
responsibility: Contributed to development of core ERP modules including production tracking and inventory control using ASP.NET MVC5 and MSSQL; collaborated with team leads on architecture decisions.
technology: ASP.NET MVC5, Entity Framework, MSSQL Server, Bootstrap, JavaScript
outcome: Successfully delivered production and inventory modules that improved material tracking accuracy by 30%.

title: Golden Sky Footwear - ERP Solution
objective: To lead the development of ERP functionalities for production and supply chain management in the footwear industry.
responsibility: Led ERP development for production planning, raw material procurement, and finished goods tracking; integrated Crystal Reports for production analysis; implemented role-based access controls.
technology: ASP.NET MVC5, Entity Framework, Crystal Reports, MSSQL Server, JavaScript, Bootstrap
outcome: Delivered an ERP that reduced material waste by 20% and improved production scheduling efficiency by 40%.

title: ICMAB Job Portal
objective: To design and develop a job portal for the Institute of Cost and Management Accountants of Bangladesh (ICMAB) to connect employers with qualified CMA professionals.
responsibility: Full-stack development using ASP.NET MVC5 and MSSQL; implemented employer and candidate registration; built resume upload and job application tracking system.
technology: ASP.NET MVC5, Entity Framework, MSSQL Server, Bootstrap, JavaScript, jQuery
outcome: Successfully launched a job portal that now serves 500+ employers and 5,000+ active job seekers.

title: Bangladesh Forest Industries Development Corporation (BFIDC) - ERP (Budget Module)
objective: To develop the Budget module for BFIDC's ERP system to enable budget planning, allocation, tracking, and variance analysis.
responsibility: Developed complete budget module using ASP.NET MVC5 and Entity Framework; implemented budget vs actual variance reporting with Crystal Reports; ensured multi-year budget tracking and approval workflows.
technology: ASP.NET MVC5, Entity Framework, Crystal Reports, MSSQL Server, Bootstrap, JavaScript
outcome: Delivered a budget management system that improved budget tracking accuracy by 50% and reduced budget approval time by 60%.

title: Blogpost Platform (CodePulse)
objective: To build a modern, full-stack blog post management platform that enables users to write, edit, and organize blog posts with rich-text formatting, categories, and media uploads, demonstrating expertise in Angular and ASP.NET Core integration.
responsibility: Developed complete full-stack application from scratch; built scalable C# Web API using ASP.NET Core with CRUD operations; created Angular components, routing, and services; implemented JWT-based authentication and authorization; integrated Entity Framework Core with SQL Server; added image upload functionality from Angular UI to Web API; implemented dependency injection in both backend and frontend; configured Swagger and Postman for API testing; implemented role-based authorization with Angular Auth Guards and Interceptors; used RxJs Observables, Subjects, and Subscriptions for state management.
technology: Angular, ASP.NET Core Web API, .NET Core, Entity Framework Core, MSSQL Server, JWT, RxJs, Swagger, Postman, Bootstrap
outcome: Successfully delivered a production-ready blog platform that demonstrates best practices in full-stack development, clean architecture, and reusable components, providing users with a seamless content creation experience.
features: Full CRUD operations using HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Image file upload from Angular UI to ASP.NET Core API
Role-based access control with Angular Auth Guards
Dependency injection implementation in both frontend and backend
Swagger and Postman API documentation and testing
Responsive Angular UI with services and routing

title: Quiz App (React)
objective: To develop a dynamic and interactive quiz application that provides users with an engaging experience to test their knowledge across various topics using multiple-choice questions, real-time feedback, and score tracking.
responsibility: Built complete React.js application from scratch; implemented multiple-choice question logic; added real-time feedback system; integrated score tracking and result calculation; designed responsive UI for desktop and mobile devices; managed application state for seamless user experience.
outcome: Successfully delivered an interactive quiz platform that provides instant feedback to users, tracks performance metrics, and offers an engaging way to test knowledge across multiple topics.
features: Final result summary with performance analysis

title: School Reunion Registration System (RAACHS)
objective: To develop a complete web-based registration system for Rajoshpur Ali Azam Chowdhury High School (RAACHS) reunion event, enabling former students to register online, upload profile pictures, select T-shirt sizes, and securely submit mobile payment transactions (bKash/Nagad) for registration fees.
responsibility: Designed and developed full-stack registration application using ASP.NET Core MVC; implemented student registration with personal, educational, and professional information; integrated profile picture upload functionality; added dynamic dropdowns for SSC batch years (1988-2022), education qualifications, profession types, and T-shirt sizes; implemented payment tracking with mobile transaction ID and sender number validation; created admin approval workflow for payment verification; implemented conditional form submission (Register/Update based on registration status); added client-side form validation for required fields; integrated success/error messaging system.
technology: ASP.NET Core MVC, C#, Entity Framework, SQL Server, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, bKash/Nagad Payment Gateway (manual transaction tracking), IIS, Visual Studio
outcome: Successfully deployed a fully functional reunion registration system that processed 500+ student registrations, reduced manual data entry by 100%, provided automated payment tracking, and enabled efficient admin approval workflow for the school reunion committee.
features: Complete student registration with personal and family information
Profile picture upload with default image fallback
Educational qualification selection from database-driven options
Profession types: Business, Government Service, Private Service, House Wife, Student
Dual fee structure: Alumni registration fee and Guest fee
Mobile payment integration tracking (bKash/Nagad) with transaction ID and sender number
T-shirt size selection (S, M, L, XL, XXL, XXXL)
Conditional button text: 'রেজিস্ট্রেশন' for new users, 'আপডেট করুণ' for existing users
Admin approval workflow with IsRegistered and IsApproved status flags
Read-only mobile number field with pre-populated data
Required field validation with red border highlighting
Success and error message display system
Responsive design with Bengali (Bangla) language support
